subject: Hi There!
content:
Hey %player%,

The Guidance Counselor suggested I try and connect with some of my peers. I hope that’s okay! We have a class together, and I wanted to say hi, but I’m not great at talking in person.

I thought emailing might be easier. I’m trying to get better at talking to people, and I was wondering if we could be pen pals?

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Jayden

options.text:
Hi Jayden,

Being pen pals sounds like a great idea. I know it can be tough to talk to people in person, but I'm here to help however I can.

What do you like to do in your free time? Maybe we have some common interests.

Talk to you soon!

Hi Jayden,

Sorry, I'm not really looking for a pen pal right now. I hope you find someone who can help you get more comfortable with talking to people.

Best of luck,

%player%

actions.item: Help Jayden Build Confidence in Social Interactions
